# Smithy

> Smithy is an interface definition language (IDL) and set of tools for building clients, servers, and documentation for any programming language. Smithy models define a service as a collection of resources, operations, and shapes.

- [Smithy](https://smithy.io/2.0/index.html)
- [Quick start](https://smithy.io/2.0/quickstart.html)
- [Trait index](https://smithy.io/2.0/trait-index.html)

## Specification

- [Aggregate types](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/aggregate-types.html)
- [Authentication traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/authentication-traits.html)
- [Behavior traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/behavior-traits.html)
- [Constraint traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/constraint-traits.html)
- [Documentation traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/documentation-traits.html)
- [Endpoint traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/endpoint-traits.html)
- [HTTP bindings](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/http-bindings.html)
- [Smithy IDL](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/idl.html)
- [Smithy specification](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/index.html)
- [JSON AST](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/json-ast.html)
- [Mixins](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/mixins.html)
- [Model validation](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/model-validation.html)
- [The Smithy model](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/model.html)
- [Serialization and Protocol traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/protocol-traits.html)
- [Resource traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/resource-traits.html)
- [Selectors](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/selectors.html)
- [Service types](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/service-types.html)
- [Simple types](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/simple-types.html)
- [Streaming](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/streaming.html)
- [Type refinement traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/type-refinement-traits.html)

- [Converting Smithy to OpenAPI](https://smithy.io/2.0/guides/model-translations/converting-to-openapi.html)

## AWS Integrations

- [Amazon API Gateway traits](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/amazon-apigateway.html)

- [AWS Service Customizations](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/customizations/index.html)
- [Amazon Machine Learning Customizations](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/customizations/machinelearning-customizations.html)
- [Amazon S3 Customizations](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/customizations/s3-customizations.html)
- [AWS integrations](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/index.html)
- [AWS EC2 query protocol](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/aws-ec2-query-protocol.html)
- [AWS JSON 1.0 protocol](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/aws-json-1_0-protocol.html)
- [AWS JSON 1.1 protocol](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/aws-json-1_1-protocol.html)
- [AWS query protocol](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/aws-query-protocol.html)
- [AWS restJson1 protocol](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/aws-restjson1-protocol.html)
- [AWS restXml protocol](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/aws-restxml-protocol.html)
- [AWS Protocols](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/protocols/index.html)
- [AWS rules engine authentication scheme validators](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/rules-engine/auth-schemes.html)
- [AWS rules engine built-ins](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/rules-engine/built-ins.html)
- [AWS rules engine extensions](https://smithy.io/2.0/aws/rules-engine/index.html)

- [Smithy Server Generator for TypeScript error handling](https://smithy.io/2.0/languages/typescript/ts-ssdk/error-handling.html)
- [Smithy Server Generator for TypeScript handlers](https://smithy.io/2.0/languages/typescript/ts-ssdk/handlers.html)
- [Server Generator for TypeScript](https://smithy.io/2.0/languages/typescript/ts-ssdk/index.html)

- [Smithy Server Generator for TypeScript supported endpoints](https://smithy.io/2.0/languages/typescript/ts-ssdk/supported-endpoints.html)
- [Smithy Server Generator for TypeScript validation](https://smithy.io/2.0/languages/typescript/ts-ssdk/validation.html)
